title: Fix mkdirSync static import and verify gates
description: Confirm mkdirSync is statically imported from "fs" at top of src/store/graph.ts, save() has no await, then run npm run build, npm test, and npm run lint to verify all gates pass. Update CLAUDE.md known-issues entry once gates are green.

plan.objective: Verify that the fix for CART-B01 (static import of mkdirSync and synchronous save() function) is correctly implemented and confirm all acceptance criteria are met by running the full gate suite.
key_changes: Verify static import of mkdirSync in src/store/graph.ts
Confirm save() function is synchronous with no await expressions
Run npm run build to verify TypeScript compilation
Run npm test to verify all tests pass including CART-B01 regression guard
Run npm run lint to verify code quality
Review CLAUDE.md known issues section for CART-B01 entry

review_plan.objective: Review the plan for CART-S01-T01 to verify it correctly addresses the CART-B01 fix (static import of mkdirSync and synchronous save()) and that all acceptance criteria are met.
key_changes: AC1 confirmed: mkdirSync is statically imported at top level in src/store/graph.ts line 2
AC2 confirmed: save() is a plain synchronous function with no await expressions
AC3 confirmed: npm run build exits 0 with no TypeScript errors
AC4 confirmed: npm test exits 0, all 31 tests pass including CART-B01 regression guard
AC5 confirmed: npm run lint exits 0
AC6 confirmed: No CART-B01 entry exists in CLAUDE.md Known issues section
mkdirSync called before writeFileSync in save() — correct ordering verified in source
No security concerns — mkdirSync with { recursive: true } is the safe pattern
Architecture alignment — single ESM import extended, not duplicated
No CART-B01 bug record found in Forge store (may be pre-store naming difference)
